system.description: When you draw a malady from a patient's body, mind, or soul, spend 1 Stock and roll +WIS.

success.description: You remove the malady and can safely discard it or store it in your sacred pouch (taking the space of 1 Stock) to study or inflict on another.

partial.description: You remove it, but choose 1: your patient suffers lingering harm or trauma; OR you suffer some of the malady's effects; OR it will be harmful and dangerous to discard.
